CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JOHN WOOLEY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-06-2011 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENG, KATHERINE JOHNSTONE, IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, EDWARD $5,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,795.00, DEFENDANT JOHN WOOLEY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT MURPHY WITHHELD PLAINTIFFS SECURITY DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH AND AWARDS DOUBLE DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
